allow: Bash(python -c "import zipfile; z=zipfile.ZipFile\(''LEO_OTFS_Report_v4.docx''\); print\(f''Valid DOCX, {len\(z.namelist\(\)\)} files''\); z.close\(\)")

Bash(python -c "numGuardTotal = \(2*8+1\) * \(2*25+1\); totalPositions = 1024 * 128; pilotBoost_lin = 10**\(10/10\); numData = totalPositions - numGuardTotal; sp_with = \(numData * 1 + 1 * pilotBoost_lin\) / totalPositions; sp_without = numData / totalPositions; excess = \(sp_with - sp_without\) / sp_without * 100; print\(f''Guard total: {numGuardTotal} \({numGuardTotal/totalPositions*100:.2f}%%\)\\nExcess power from pilot: {excess:.3f}%%\\n=> Negligible impact on MMSE''\)")

Bash(python3 -c "delta_tau = 1/\(1024*120e3\); c = 3e8; fc = 2e9; Ts = \(1+0.07\)/120e3; delta_nu = 1/\(128*Ts\); print\(f''1 delay bin = {delta_tau*c:.2f} m''\); print\(f''0.1 bin = {0.1*delta_tau*c:.2f} m''\); print\(f''0.5 bin = {0.5*delta_tau*c:.2f} m''\); print\(f''1 Doppler bin = {delta_nu*c/fc:.2f} m/s''\); print\(f''0.1 Dop bin = {0.1*delta_nu*c/fc:.2f} m/s''\); print\(f''0.75 Dop bin = {0.75*delta_nu*c/fc:.2f} m/s''\); print\(f''delta_nu = {delta_nu:.2f} Hz''\); print\(f''delta_tau = {delta_tau*1e9:.4f} ns''\)")

Bash(matlab -batch "delta_tau = 1/\(1024*120e3\); c = 3e8; fc = 2e9; Ts = \(1+0.07\)/120e3; delta_nu = 1/\(128*Ts\); fprintf\(''1 delay bin = %.2f m\\n'', delta_tau*c\); fprintf\(''0.5 delay bin = %.2f m\\n'', 0.5*delta_tau*c\); fprintf\(''1 Doppler bin = %.2f m/s\\n'', delta_nu*c/fc\); fprintf\(''0.1 Dop bin = %.2f m/s\\n'', 0.1*delta_nu*c/fc\); fprintf\(''0.75 Dop bin = %.2f m/s\\n'', 0.75*delta_nu*c/fc\); fprintf\(''delta_nu = %.4f Hz\\n'', delta_nu\); fprintf\(''delta_tau = %.4f ns\\n'', delta_tau*1e9\);")
